Morgan Ellis
Ann Arbor, MI

DIGITAL CONTENT SPECIALIST
Greenway Community Services | 2023-2026

- Maintained page content, images, links, and navigation for a WordPress website
  serving six community programs.
- Adjusted HTML and CSS templates to support new campaign pages and improve
  layouts on phones and tablets.
- Worked from simple design mockups and coordinated revisions with a freelance
  designer and program managers.
- Used browser developer tools to investigate styling problems and broken form
  fields before escalating code changes to an external developer.
- Checked new pages in Chrome and on common mobile screen sizes before
  publication.
- Applied heading structure, alternative text, descriptive link text, and basic
  image optimization during content updates.
- Wrote project tickets and explained publishing constraints to non-technical
  stakeholders.

COMMUNICATIONS ASSISTANT
River County Arts Council | 2021-2023

- Published event pages and newsletters using a content management system and
  reusable templates.
- Made small HTML and CSS edits to correct spacing, typography, and content
  presentation.
- Coordinated website requests with staff members and an outside web agency.

PROJECTS AND TRAINING

- Completed introductory JavaScript coursework covering variables, functions,
  arrays, events, and DOM updates.
- Built a small responsive portfolio site with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
- Used GitHub Desktop to version personal coursework and portfolio changes.
